✦ A Letter for You ✦
Dear Best Friend,

You are not just my friend,
you are my hero, my support,
my ride-or-die, forever.
Thanks for always being there
through every up and down.
May your dreams come true and
may you always be happy,
healthy and successful!

♡
Happy Birthday!
